channel.name: PAS OUT

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: Set MSH.7.1 and QRD.1.1 to current date/time
Set MSH.10.1 and QRD.4.1 to message ID
Set hosnum parameter

com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.name: XSLT Transform Response
com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.template:
ABC NHS <xsl:value-of select="concat(translate(substring(PID.5/PID.5.5,1,1), $vLower, $vUpper),translate(substring(PID.5/PID.5.5,2), $vUpper, $vLower))"/>
GB

channel.preprocessingScript: // Modify the message variable below to pre process data return message;
